results.title: General : Reduction In Diesel Price To Bring Direct Benefits To The People - Mustapha
results.description: KOTA KINABALU, June 22 (Bernama) -- The reduction in the subsidised diesel price to RM2.10 per litre from July proves that the economic reforms and targeted subsidy measures implemented by the MADANI Government are beginning to deliver direct benefits to the people.

results.title: Integra LifeSciences: New Beginning
results.description: Integra LifeSciences specializes in neuro-related surgical devices and regenerative tissue technologies. Read why IART stock is a Buy.

results.title: Stock Market Today: Sensex, Nifty Trade Higher in Early Deals Amid Easing West Asia Tensions
results.description: Sensex surged over 400 points or 0.54 per cent to touch an intraday high of 77,223 in morning trade, while Nifty traded more than 100 points or 0.51 per cent higher at 24,137. Among sectoral indices, IT stocks led the gains, with the Nifty IT index rising over 1 per cent.

results.title: Threat of further flight disruption over as baggage handlers reach deal
results.description: Aviapartner’s management and trade unions have reached a memorandum of understanding, meaning the threat of further disruption to flights as a result of last week's baggage handlers' strike is likely over. A spontaneous strike had broken out last Monday following the recent announcement of a new...

results.title: Asian shares are mixed and US futures fall as Iran talks make progress
results.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Asian stocks were mixed Monday with markets in Japan and South Korea trading higher, while oil prices edged lower on fresh optimism over progress in U.S.-Iran negotiations. U.S. futures were trading lower. Tokyo’s Nikkei 225 jumped 1.6% to 72,364.82, after reaching a new all-time record of 72,831.73 during intraday trading, helped [...]

results.title: From near-bankruptcy to chip king: SK Hynix eclipses Samsung in market value
results.description: AI-driven demand for high-bandwidth memory chips has propelled SK Hynix past Samsung Electronics, capping one of South Korea's most remarkable corporate turnarounds
